properties.name: Ramkund & Ghats
properties.description: Core bathing ghat area along Godavari river including Ramkund, Sita Gufa, and surrounding ghats. Highest pilgrim concentration during Shahi Snan.

properties.name: Panchvati & Temples
properties.description: Historic temple district including Kalaram Temple, Panchvati area, and surrounding markets. Dense residential lanes.

properties.name: Tapovan
properties.description: Tapovan area along the Godavari with ashrams, gardens, and pilgrimage sites. Relatively open terrain with river access.

properties.name: Nashik Road & Transit
properties.description: Major transit hub including Nashik Road railway station, bus depot, and connecting roads. Primary arrival/departure point for pilgrims.

properties.name: Dwarka
properties.description: Dwarka residential and commercial area west of Panchvati. Moderate density with mixed residential and commercial use.

properties.name: CBS & Commercial
properties.description: Central Bus Stand area and surrounding commercial district. Key bus transit point with heavy vehicular and pedestrian traffic.
